title: 1 step DFU - Language update when both EB and CC have updates
scenario: 1-step DFU for language change updates both earbuds and charge case firmware when both have pending updates on Osprey
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Connect Osprey earbuds and charge case (both at least firmware version 5039) with pending updates available for both devices.
3. From the Home screen, tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
5. Select any language from the available options.
7. Observe the screen that appears after tapping 'Update Now'.
expected: The Software Update screen is displayed. After the language change DFU completes, both earbuds and charge case are on the latest firmware, and the language is properly changed on the charge case (verifiable via the charge case touch screen menus).
